title: OpenStax College Success
description: A source card for the OpenStax College Success textbook.

pages.text: OpenStax College Success covers goal setting, time management, reading strategies, note-taking, studying, communication, wellness, finances, and planning.
Use this source for older students who need explicit support with academic reading routines, self-management, and transition skills.
OpenStax books carry Creative Commons licenses. Check the linked book page for the exact license before mirroring chapters, figures, or ancillary materials.
